upload.alertWrongFormat: Please select a binary log file (.bin)

riskNotes.high: CRITICAL: Serious anomalies detected. Further flights are prohibited until a full technical inspection!
riskNotes.medium: Requires attention from technical personnel before the next flight.
riskNotes.low: Flight is within normal limits or requires critical inspection.

welcome.title: Welcome to Telemetry Analysis System
welcome.subtitle: Upload your flight log (.bin) to get detailed analytics, 3D visualization, and insights from the AI assistant.
welcome.feature1Desc: Haversine distance calculation, max speed, and acceleration with noise filtering.
welcome.feature2Desc: Interactive playback of the flight trajectory with accurate vehicle attitude in space.
welcome.feature3Desc: Built-in assistant will analyze your flight and suggest improvements for your vehicle.
welcome.uploadHint: Use the upload button to get started
